title: Antyodaya Express Coaches
contentHtml:
Provision of cushioned luggage racks which can serve as seat during rush. Moulding PUF foam seats can be explored.

 

Provision of additional hand hold in doorway area.

Provision of J hooks near longitudinal luggage racks.

 

 

Vestibuled ends for inter coach movement of passengers and the service staff.

Portable water similar to aquagaurd type water filtration system.

Enhanced number of mobile Charging points.

Provision of Bio-toilets.

 

More pleasing color scheme for interior and exterior with anti-graffiti measures.
